expectations.evidence: Workflow Followed: 'workflows/sync-bmad-documents.md -- Batch Mode (Steps B1 through B3)'

expectations.text: Checks for memory/batch-sync-config.json, runs sync.mjs init-batch if missing
expectations.evidence: Phase 2: 'Check if memory/batch-sync-config.json already exists... If missing, initialize it: node <skill-path>/scripts/sync.mjs init-batch'

expectations.text: init-batch reads _bmad/bmm/config.yaml to discover planning_artifacts and implementation_artifacts paths
expectations.evidence: Phase 2: 'This reads _bmad/bmm/config.yaml to auto-discover document locations from planning_artifacts and implementation_artifacts paths.'

expectations.text: Presents the batch config to user for review before saving
expectations.evidence: Phase 2: 'Present the discovered config to the user for review before proceeding.'

expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs batch to scan all configured paths
Shows a summary table of all discovered documents and their sync status
expectations.evidence: Phase 3 shows a table with columns File, Type, Linked, Status listing documents and their sync status

expectations.text: Processes each file that needs syncing, pausing on conflicts
expectations.evidence: Phase 6c: 'For sections with conflicts, show both local and remote versions side-by-side. Ask the user per section: Keep local, Keep remote, Skip'
